summary: Complete Partner Portal frontend testing. All 11 features tested successfully: Partner login, Dashboard with stats/charts, QR Scanner page, Team Management with RBAC roles, Referrals & Credits with $5 program, navigation, modals (Invite Business, Invite Team Member), Roles Guide, Partner Offers with gem pricing, and Partner Analytics with charts/insights.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after component mount
Minor console warning: 'The tag <icon> is unrecognized in this browser' - appears to be a recharts internal issue, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Partner Portal fully implements all required features
QR Code Redemption System has all controls (Start Scanner, Upload Image, Recent Redemptions, How to Scan)
Multi-user Team Management with RBAC correctly shows Owner, Manager, Staff roles with appropriate permissions
Business Referral System correctly shows $5 credit program with referral code and credit usage options (Subscription Discount, Boost Your Offers)
Payouts feature successfully removed and replaced with Referrals & Credits
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for automated testing
All components use proper dark theme styling

success_rate.backend: N/A - Frontend only testing (ALL DATA IS MOCKED)

seed_data_creation: None - ALL DATA IS MOCKED in components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner Portal is fully functional with mocked data. Access via Welcome screen -> Partner Portal button -> Login. All navigation works via sidebar with data-testid attributes (partner-nav-dashboard, partner-nav-scan, partner-nav-offers, partner-nav-analytics, partner-nav-team, partner-nav-referrals). Modals for inviting team members and businesses work correctly. Gem pricing displays correctly on offers page.
mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IN PARTNER PORTAL COMPONENTS IS MOCKED - no real backend API integration for authentication or data persistence.

details.header: Partner Dashboard - Track your business performance on SnapRoad
details.offers_table: Top Performing Offers with Views, Clicks, Redemptions, Revenue columns

details.page_header: QR Code Scanner - Scan customer QR codes to validate and redeem offers
details.instructions: How to Scan section with 3 steps
details.recent_redemptions: Shows last 4 redemptions with offer title, customer name, staff, time

details.page_header: Team Management - Manage staff access and permissions for QR code redemptions
details.team_table: Shows members with Role badges (Owner, Manager, Staff), Status badges (Active, Pending, Revoked), Last Active, Redemptions Today
details.roles_guide: Expandable section showing Owner, Manager, Staff permissions

details.email_invite_tab: Email Address input field with placeholder
details.share_code_tab: Generated invite code (e.g., SNAP-STAFF-0FGPK2) with copy button, expires in 7 days
details.role_selection: Staff and Manager role cards with descriptions

details.page_header: Business Referrals - Refer other businesses and earn $5 credit each
details.banner: Earn $5 for Every Business You Refer
use_credits: Subscription Discount - Save $15.00 on your next bill
Boost Your Offers - Get featured placement for 3 days
details.referrals_table: Shows referrals with Business, Email, Referred date, Status, Credit Earned columns

details.header: Invite a Business - Both of you earn $5 credit
details.credit_message: When they sign up, you both get $5!
